string.text: Arena: Avenger Battle Master
You have become a master of Avenger battles.
You have become a master of Avenger battles.
Arena: Bodyguard Battle Master
You have become a master of Bodyguard battles.
You have become a master of Bodyguard battles.
Arena: Duel Battle Master
You have become a master of Duel battles.
You have become a master of Duel battles.
Arena: Partner Battle Master
You have become a master of Partner battles.
You have become a master of Partner battles.
Arena: Hunt Battle Master
You have become a master of Hunt battles.
You have become a master of Hunt battles.
Arena: Survival Battle Master
You have become a master of Survival battles.
You have become a master of Survival battles.
Arena: Absolute Champion
You have become the Absolute Champion of the Arena by winning all battles.
You have become the Absolute Champion of the Arena by winning all battles.
